content: agent2 here: implementing groupby filter separator param (Django-style field lookups) in src/jinja2/filters.py. Will touch do_groupby and related helper functions. Let me know if you're also touching filters.py.

agent2: ack. My separator param is a keyword-only style addition (added as new param after 'default', threaded through make_attrgetter/_prepare_attribute_parts as well since those are shared helpers). Since we appear to be in separate isolated copies of the repo, our patches will likely need manual merging by the harness - my diff only touches make_attrgetter, make_multi_attrgetter's helper _prepare_attribute_parts (default separator='.', backward compatible), and sync_do_groupby/do_groupby signatures+docstrings. Should be a straightforward textual merge with your reverse param.
